bypass_findings.observed_control: script exits with disabled direct deploy guard
workflow validates decision_id, validated_object_hash, and invocation_nonce before execution
execute route requires validation registry match before proof persistence
proof route binds proof to execution_id and validated object hash

bypass_findings.path: GitHub repository settings, branch protection rules
bypass_findings.risk: An admin/settings change could weaken workflow or branch protections outside the governed deploy lifecycle.
bypass_findings.observed_control: Repository admin and branch protection authority are external root surfaces in runtime/sovereignty/root_authority_inventory.json; no secret values are inspected.

bypass_findings.path: GitHub repository secrets, GitHub environment secrets
bypass_findings.risk: Secret or environment mutation could redirect runtime/deploy authority without becoming MindShift authority.
bypass_findings.observed_control: Repository/environment secrets are inventoried as external root dependencies and secret material remains NOT_INSPECTED.

bypass_findings.path: Cloudflare account, Cloudflare API token, wrangler.toml
bypass_findings.risk: A Cloudflare account or token holder could deploy directly outside /session -> /continuity -> /authority -> /compile -> /validate -> /execute -> /proof.
bypass_findings.observed_control: Cloudflare account/token authority is classified as root/external authority; workflow deploy scan does not inspect token values.

bypass_findings.path: local wrangler CLI, local environment credentials, package.json
bypass_findings.risk: A local authenticated wrangler deploy command remains a root authority escape hatch if executed outside governed workflow.
bypass_findings.observed_control: Local Wrangler authority is classified as root/local bypass risk; package deploy guard is disabled and deploy:dry-run uses --dry-run.

bypass_paths.risk: mutation-capable path absent from canonical closure inventory
database write absent from mutation surface inventory
GET-only observability route becomes executable or authoritative
